scientific_integrity_rule: This plan records the revision decision boundary after metric-contract ambiguity. It must not select a formula, change thresholds, edit logits or metrics, rerun controls, drop subjects post hoc, reclassify failed controls, or open Phase 1 claims.
required_sources_to_review: notebook run logs and decision memos
allowed_revision_outcomes: lock raw_ba_ratio and keep existing controls fail-closed
lock gain_over_chance_ratio then implement a scoped code/config fix with tests before any rerun
declare metric contract unresolved and keep controls fail-closed
